# CircuiTry3D App Metadata

## App Name
CircuiTry3D

## Short Description (80 characters max)
3D circuit builder with AI assistant, FUSE™ failure engine & live simulation

## Full Description (4000 characters max, optimized for keywords)

**Illuminate Electricity with CircuiTry3D**

👥 **For Everyone** — to facilitate and enhance the learning.

CircuiTry3D is a revolutionary 3D, interactive electric circuit builder that brings electrical concepts to life. Created by founder **Mitchell Lorin McKnight**, the experience combines advanced visualization, AI-powered assistance, and Ohm's law calculations to help students, educators, and electronics enthusiasts understand current flow and circuit behavior down to the atomic level.

**Key Features:**

🔌 **Interactive 3D Circuit Building**
- Build circuits in a fully immersive 3D environment
- Drag and drop components: resistors, capacitors, batteries, LEDs, and more
- Real-time circuit simulation and feedback
- Intuitive touch controls optimized for mobile devices

⚡ **Real-Time Ohm's Law Visualization**
- Watch current flow through your circuits in real-time
- See voltage, current, and resistance values dynamically
- Visualize electrical behavior at the atomic level — all the way to quantum probability clouds
- Color-coded W.I.R.E. display: Watts, Current, Resistance, Voltage

🤖 **Circuit AI Assistant (Free for All Users)**
- Built-in AI chat assistant available directly in the circuit builder
- Ask anything about Ohm's Law, KCL/KVL, component behavior, or troubleshooting
- Context-aware: reads your live circuit and tailors answers to what you've actually built
- Covers 40+ electrical topics — theory, components, app tutorials, and design guidance
- No subscription required — free for every user

✨ **AI Circuit Explanation (Premium Feature)**
- One tap generates a full AI-powered breakdown of your live circuit
- Structured 5-section report: Summary, Current Flow, Component Roles, Expected Behavior, and Common Mistakes
- Identifies design errors and flags common beginner mistakes automatically
- Works even offline with a local analysis fallback — always available

💥 **FUSE™ Failure Understanding Simulation Engine**
- See what actually happens when a component is pushed past its limits
- 30+ named failure modes: Thermal Runaway, Junction Burnout, Avalanche Breakdown, and more
- Smoke, arcs, explosions, and plain-language physics explanations in real 3D
- Covers 18+ component families: resistors, capacitors, LEDs, transistors, relays, and more

📚 **Educational & Interactive Learning**
- Perfect for students learning electrical engineering
- Ideal for physics, CTE, and electronics courses
- Integrated two-year electrical engineering textbook built directly into the app
- Adaptive practice worksheets that target your weakest concepts

🎯 **Advanced Features:**
- Component Arena — stress-test any component under configurable conditions
- Classroom Mode — teacher dashboard, roster management, and real-time analytics
- Schematic overlay — auto-generated 2D schematics alongside the 3D view
- Save and load circuit designs
- Gamification: XP, badges, leaderboards, and arcade games

**Who Is This For?**

- Students studying electrical engineering, physics, or electronics
- Teachers and educators looking for interactive teaching tools
- Electronics hobbyists and makers
- Anyone curious about how electricity works — no experience required

**Why CircuiTry3D?**

Traditional circuit learning can be abstract and difficult to visualize. CircuiTry3D makes electrical concepts tangible by providing a safe, interactive environment where you can experiment, learn, and understand electricity like never before. The built-in AI assistant answers your questions in real time, and the AI Circuit Explanation engine breaks down exactly what your circuit is doing and why — so you learn from every build, not just the ones that work. No need for physical components or expensive equipment — everything you need is right in your pocket!

**Keywords:** circuit builder, electrical engineering, electronics learning, Ohm's law, 3D simulation, interactive learning, AI assistant, circuit AI, circuit analysis, AI circuit explanation, circuit design, electrical circuits, physics education, STEM education, electronics simulator, circuit simulator, voltage, current, resistance, educational app, failure simulation, FUSE engine

**Privacy First:**
We respect your privacy. CircuiTry3D only collects minimal data necessary for account management and app functionality. See our privacy policy for details.

Start building circuits today — with an AI that explains every step of the way.
